description_long: This is a compact, freestanding wooden nightstand or side table with a rectangular shape and a two-tone finish. The tabletop is a darker wood, contrasting with the lighter-colored body, which features a single central drawer with a round knob. Below the drawer, there is an open shelf space supported by four straight legs, providing additional storage or display area. The sides and back are solid panels, while the front is distinguished by the presence of the drawer. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use in bedrooms, living rooms, or urban waiting areas. The craftsmanship appears sturdy, with clean lines and a classic, understated aesthetic.
description: A small, two-tone wooden nightstand with a dark top, single drawer, and open lower shelf. Sturdy, simple, and functional for storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with a round knob and the open lower shelf.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid panel and the open shelf beneath the tabletop.
description_view_2: Back view with a plain solid panel and open lower shelf, no drawer visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and open shelf.
